value.found_quote: Claude Code is an agent that reads your codebase, edits files, and runs commands across your terminal, IDE, desktop app, and browser. Build, debug, and ship with natural language.
value.rationale: The page is Anthropic's official Claude Code product page (https://www.anthropic.com/claude-code). It clearly describes Claude Code as an actively available product with pricing plans, download instructions, feature announcements, and integration options. The offering is generally available (not in preview or beta), with active subscription pricing and multiple access methods listed.
